summary: Verified bug fixes for Try Different Mode and Memory Game accuracy. Both bugs are FIXED and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: tryDifferentMode() (lines 1231-1250) resets score/streak/answers/matchedPairs to 0 before showing mode selection
BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: selectNewMode() (lines 1252-1305) checks originalGameType === 'all_modes' and calls /select-mode endpoint instead of creating new session
BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: Same session ID maintained when switching modes in ALL_MODES session (ps_13a549193b4444cb stayed same)
BUG FIX 2 VERIFIED: Memory game handleCardClick() (lines 630-662) only increments score when match is found (line 645), not on every card click
BUG FIX 2 VERIFIED: Score resets to 0 when switching modes - Memory game showed '0 / 8 pairs found' after switching from Quiz
originalGameType state (line 766) correctly tracks if session started as ALL_MODES
seed_data_creation: Created ALL_MODES sessions: ps_25872f8622834e50, ps_13a549193b4444cb, ps_93832c44e7b7428e
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes for Try Different Mode and Memory Game accuracy are fully verified. Key test flow: (1) Create ALL_MODES session, (2) Play Quiz mode, complete it, (3) Click 'Try Different Mode', (4) Verify same session ID in URL, (5) Select Memory Game, (6) Verify score starts at 0/8 pairs. Memory game only increments score on successful pair match.

session_id_maintained.description: URL remained ps_13a549193b4444cb after clicking Try Different Mode
session_id_maintained.evidence: Playwright test output: 'BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: Same session ID maintained!'

score_reset_on_mode_switch.description: Score reset to 0 when switching from Quiz to Memory
score_reset_on_mode_switch.evidence: Memory game showed '0 / 8 pairs found' and header showed Score: 0, Streak: 0

select_mode_endpoint_used.description: selectNewMode() calls /select-mode endpoint for ALL_MODES sessions
select_mode_endpoint_used.evidence: Code review at lines 1263-1271 in PlayToLearnGame.js

score_only_on_match.description: Score only increments when pair is matched, not on every card click
score_only_on_match.evidence: Code at line 645: setScore(prev => prev + 1) is inside if (newSelected[0].pairId === newSelected[1].pairId) block

score_reset_on_switch.description: Score resets to 0 when switching modes
score_reset_on_switch.evidence: Lines 1233, 1254: setScore(0) called in tryDifferentMode and selectNewMode

accuracy_calculation.description: Memory game shows correct pairs found (e.g., 1/8, not 16/8)
accuracy_calculation.evidence: Screenshot shows '1 / 8 pairs found' after finding one pair
